_publications._publicationTitle: Medium throughput biochemical compound screening identifies novel agents for pharmacotherapy of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: we exposed MEF Nf1 −/− E1A-p53 cells and isogenic control MEF Nf1wt E1A-p53 cells to various doses of the compounds
details: Used as isogenic control to assess selective toxicity of compounds toward NF1-deficient cells
